notes: Ships the geometric Route C assembly for the Hasse bound: TARGET 1 (abstract zsmul-injectivity over an infinite group with finite torsion, plus EC specialisation) and a layered family of degree_eq_N theorems (v1/v2/v3/hpicval_discharged) reducing the residual list from {hnat, hdual_hom, CoordHom, Vieta, hgeom} down to {hpoint, htrace_dual, CoordHom, Vieta, hgeom}. No sorry, no maxHeartbeats. Eight of fourteen declarations are unused within this file and serve as entry points for external callers; the key internal hub is degree_eq_N_via_picDual_geometric_v2, called by three other theorems in the file.
